metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_527
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.1 Pin1 protein is present in the PSD fraction derived from cortical tissues of human brain.
Literal: "Pin1 proteins exist in detergent-resistant dendritic rafts and PSD fractions"

Fig. 2 Pin1 protein, in cortical neurons partially colocalyze with NR1 and Shank3 proteins"
Literal: "Pin1 proteins also partly colocalized with NR1 proteins along with Shank3 proteins at the dendritic spines of excitatory neuron". Experimental description: Synaptosome, Dendritic Raft, and PSD Preparation are prepared from **human samples**
Literal from M&M: "Synaptosomes were prepared from frontal cortical tissues of
human brains"

Experiment of neuronal colture staining are made in **mouse**
Literal from M&M: "Cortical neurons of C57/BL6 mice at E18 and Pin1 knockout mice at P0 were cultured on coverslips for immunocytochemical analysis"

17/5/2017 Pim
- I agreed with annotation to human species since fractionation data has the highest resolution and is additionally supported by IF in mouse.

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
